description: ¬ß21.3 ‚Äî an `import` statement nested inside a `function` body fires E-IMPORT-003. Imports must live at file top-level (top of a `${ }` logic preamble), never inside a function/fn declaration.
rationale: ¬ß21.3: `import` is a file-top declaration. An `import { helper } from './m.scrml'` placed inside the body of `build()` is rejected E-IMPORT-003 (import inside a function body, not file top-level).
